name: Laulau
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into 4 pieces and soak in water for 70 minutes.
2. Cut the pork butt into 4 pieces.
3. Prepare the luau leaves by stripping the outer skin of stem and leaf veins to prevent itching in the throat when consumed.
4. Wash and remove tough ribs from Ti leaves.
5. Lay 2 ti leaves on a cutting board.
6. Place 4 luau leaves in the center.
7. Place a piece of pork and a piece of fish on the luau leaves.
8. Fold the luau leaves over the meat and fish to form a bundle.
9. Tie the ends of the ti leaves and steam for 3 to 4 hours.
- You may substitute 1 to 1 1/2 lb. spinach for luau leaves.
